procedure: Read HANDOFF.md and the current GPD project artifacts.
Verified each cited arXiv identifier against the corresponding arXiv abstract page.
Cross-checked journal metadata when available from arXiv-related DOI metadata or journal-index pages.
Compared the manuscript-facing summaries against the machine-readable GPD state for stale or unsupported claims.
Corrected the Antonini and Sahu benchmark descriptions and restored the missing Engelhardt benchmark.
Audited the explicit equation surface and removed the unsupported S_{dS} = S_{ent} state entry.
Normalized the semiclassical control parameters so they are dimensionless.
limitations: Phase 02 and phase 04 still have no execution summaries, so the project remains a benchmark synthesis rather than a completed derivation pipeline.
The GPD progress metric still reports populated-plan completion rather than total-roadmap completion.
No Antonini-specific boundary observable has yet been computed that separates microscopic resolution from generic probe avoidance.
